subject: [PATCH v5 16/21] swap: do not unnecesarily pin readahead swap entries

2026-03-20.patch_summary: This patch optimizes swap readahead by not unnecessarily pinning entries in the same virtual swap cluster as the target entry, which is already pinned by the caller. The patch introduces a new function `vswap_same_cluster` to check if two virtual swap entries belong to the same vswap cluster. It then uses this function to skip unnecessary pinning of readahead entries that are already protected by the target entry's cluster. This change aims to improve performance and reduce overhead in swap operations.
